title: salvia candidissima subsp. occidentalis
intro: Salvia candidissima subsp. occidentalis, a subspecies of the Salvia candidissima plant, is a type of flowering perennial native to Mexico. The plant's leaves and stems are used in herbal medicine, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them useful for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Salvia candidissima subsp. occidentalis are said to provide health benefits such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and treating respiratory problems. Salvia candidissima subsp. occidentalis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
